flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Meridian Community College are 6% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($31.0k vs $33.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Meridian Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.0k vs 2.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Meridian Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Meridian Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.1k).
